headline: Cancer Drug Maker With $172 Million Revenue and Multiple Approved Therapies Draws $6.5 Million Investment
summary: This clinical-stage biotech develops oncology therapeutics and partners with leading institutions in cancer and immunology research.

headline: Biotech Stock Up 365% as This $8 Million Investment Targets a Drug With 3 NDA Filings Planned
summary: This biotech specializes in precision therapies for rare genetic diseases, with a pipeline targeting oncology and hematology indications.

headline: Biogen Details West Coast Hub, Felzartamab Phase 3 Plans and AMR Readout Timeline at Conference
summary: Biogen (NASDAQ:BIIB) outlined its growing “West Coast Hub” and development plans for felzartamab, an anti-CD38 antibody being studied across multiple kidney-related immunology indications, during a conference discussion between Leerink Partners analyst Marc Goodman and Utpal Patel, Biogen’s Head of
